title: Vanessa Vidas
content:
Chief of Staff to the Senior Leadership Team
People.ContactEmail vvidas@mccarthy.ca
As Chief of Staff to the firm’s Senior Leadership Team, Vanessa works with leadership team members to drive the firm’s strategic direction and priorities. She is responsible for several firm-wide initiatives and works to connect colleagues across the firm.
With over 25 years experience in the professional services industry, Vanessa has amassed a unique combination of program management, business process redesign, change leadership and technology implementation skills.
- Publication Living on the Leading Edge: Clients’ Needs Mean Embracing Technological Change September 21, 2018
- Publication Embracing Flexibility in Your Career March 26, 2018
